news.t: Matt Kaufman on the Calamos Approach to Autocallable ETFs
Wrap-Up From VettaFi's Q2 Market Outlook Symposium

overview.description: The Calamos Nasdaq Autocallable Income ETF (CAIQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed, utilizing a weekly laddered autocallable income strategy on a Nasdaq-100 based index. It aims for a high, stable monthly income with some downside cushion. CAIQ was launched on Nov 20, 2025 and is issued by Calamos.
